memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_hfp_ag *ag, char *number, uint8_t type, uint8_t service)
memberdef.name: bt_hfp_ag_query_subscriber_func_t

detaileddescription.para: When AG wants to send subscriber number information, all information will be passed through the callback. And the subscriber number information will be sent out in this function.

parameterdescription.para:
Type of subscriber number specifies the format of the phone number provided, and can be one of the following values:
values 128-143: The phone number format may be a national or international format, and may contain prefix and/or escape digits. No changes on the number presentation are required.
values 144-159: The phone number format is an international number, including the country code prefix. If the plus sign ("+") is not included as part of the number and shall be added by the AG as needed.
values 160-175: National number. No prefix nor escape digits included.
Service of subscriber number indicates which service this phone number relates to. Shall be either 4 (voice) or 5 (fax).

simplesect.para: 0 if should continue to the next subscriber number information.
negative value to stop.

detaileddescription.para: Register Handsfree profile AG callbacks to monitor the state and get the required HFP details to display.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.

parameterdescription.para: Peer rfcomm channel to be connected.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.
0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Notify HFP Unit of an incoming call.

detaileddescription.para: Notify HFP Unit of an incoming call.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Put the incoming call on hold.

detaileddescription.para: Put the incoming call on hold.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.
0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.
0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.
0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.
0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.
0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.
0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Notify HFP Unit that the remote starts ringing.

detaileddescription.para: Notify HFP Unit that the remote starts ringing.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Notify HFP Unit that the remote rejects the call.

detaileddescription.para: Notify HFP Unit that the remote rejects the call.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Notify HFP Unit that the remote accepts the call.

detaileddescription.para: Notify HFP Unit that the remote accepts the call.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Notify HFP Unit that the remote terminates the active/hold call.

detaileddescription.para: Notify HFP Unit that the remote terminates the active/hold call.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: Connects the two calls and disconnects the subscriber from both calls (Explicit Call Transfer). If CONFIG_BT_HFP_AG_3WAY_CALL is not enabled, the error -ENOTSUP will be returned if the function called.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.
0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.
0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.

parameterdescription.para: Current mode and provides no information with regard to the name of the operator.
A string in alphanumeric format representing the name of the network operator. This string shall not exceed 16 characters.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: Create audio conenction by HFP AG. There are two setups included, Codec connection and audio connection. The codec connection will be established firstly if the codec negotiation are supported by both side. If the passed codec id is not same as the last codec connection, the codec connection procedure will be triggered. After the codec conenction is established, the audio conenction will be started. The passed codec id could be one of BT_HFP_AG_CODEC_XXX. If the codec negotiation feature is supported by both side, the codec id could be one of the bitmaps of ids notified by callback codec. Or, the id should be BT_HFP_AG_CODEC_CVSD.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.
0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: Enables/disables the voice recognition function. If CONFIG_BT_HFP_AG_VOICE_RECG is not enabled, the error -ENOTSUP will be returned if the function called.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: It is used to set the voice recognition engine state. The unsolicited result code +BVRA: 1,<vrecstate> will be sent. <vrecstate>: Bitmask that reflects the current state of the voice recognition engine on the AG. Bit 0 - If it is 1, the AG is ready to accept audio input Bit 1 - If it is 1, the AG is sending audio to the HF Bit 2 - If it is 1, the AG is processing the audio input If CONFIG_BT_HFP_AG_ENH_VOICE_RECG is not enabled, the error -ENOTSUP will be returned if the function called.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_hfp_ag *ag, uint8_t state, const char *id, uint8_t type, uint8_t operation, const char *text)
memberdef.name: bt_hfp_ag_vre_textual_representation

briefdescription.para: set voice recognition engine state and textual representation

detaileddescription.para: It is used to set the voice recognition engine state with textual representation. unsolicited result code +BVRA: 1,<vrecstate>, <textualRepresentation> will be sent. <vrecstate> is same as parameter state of function bt_hfp_ag_vre_state. <textualRepresentation>: <textID>,<textType>,<textOperation>, <string>. <textID>: Unique ID of the current text as a hexadecimal string (a maximum of 4 characters in length, but less than 4 characters in length is valid). <textType>: ID of the textType from the following list: 0 - Text recognized by the AG from the audio input provided by the HF 1 - Text of the audio output from the AG 2 - Text of the audio output from the AG that contains a question 3 - Text of the audio output from the AG that contains an error description <textOperation>: ID of the operation of the text 1 - NewText: Indicates that a new text started. Shall be used when the <textID> changes 2 - Replace: Replace any existing text with the same <textID> and same <textType> 3 - Append: Attach new text to existing text and keep the same <textID> and same <textType> <string>: The <string> parameter shall be a UTF-8 text string and shall always be contained within double quotes. If CONFIG_BT_HFP_AG_VOICE_RECG_TEXT is not enabled, the error -ENOTSUP will be returned if the function called.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.
0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.
0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.
0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.
0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_hfp_ag *ag, enum hfp_ag_hf_indicators indicator, bool enable)
memberdef.name: bt_hfp_ag_hf_indicator

detaileddescription.para: It allows HF to issue the +BIND unsolicited result code to activate/deactivate of the AG’s supported HF Indicators. The indicator of supported indicators can be activated/deactivated are defined in enum hfp_ag_hf_indicators. BT_HFP_AG_HF_INDICATOR_ENH_SAFETY is used to support Enhanced Safety. Only the configuration has been enabled, the indicator can be HFP_AG_ENHANCED_SAFETY_IND. BT_HFP_AG_HF_INDICATOR_BATTERY is used to support Remaining level of Battery. Only the configuration has been enabled, the indicator can be HFP_AG_BATTERY_LEVEL_IND. If CONFIG_BT_HFP_HF_HF_INDICATORS is not enabled, the error -ENOTSUP will be returned if the function called.

parameterdescription.para: The indicator of the AG’s supported HF Indicators.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: It is used to set the ongoing calls when AT command AT+CIND? is received.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success or negative value in case of error.
